scenes.description: Opening title card: 'Why Vector Databases Are Changing AI'
scenes.shot_intent: Establish the topic and draw the viewer in immediately
scenes.information_role: Viewer learns what the video is about

scenes.description: Abstract visualization of high-dimensional embeddings as floating points converging in space
scenes.shot_intent: Make the abstract concept of vector embeddings visually intuitive
scenes.information_role: Viewer understands how vector search differs from keyword search

required_assets.description: 3D scatter plot of embedding vectors with semantic clustering

scenes.shot_intent: Drive the viewer to take action
